recommended.name: Salicylic Acid
recommended.benefit: Exfoliates inside the pore and reduces inflammation.

recommended.name: Retinol
recommended.benefit: Increases cell turnover and prevents clogged pores.

recommended.name: Ceramides
recommended.benefit: Restores the skin barrier to prevent moisture loss.

recommended.name: Shea Butter
recommended.benefit: Rich emollient that seals in moisture.

recommended.name: Squalane
recommended.benefit: Lightweight moisturizer that mirrors natural sebum.

avoid.name: Strong exfoliants
avoid.reason: May cause micro-tears on thin, dry skin.

avoid.name: Heavy mineral oil
avoid.reason: Can trap sebum and sweat beneath the surface.

avoid.name: Lanolin
avoid.reason: Often too emollient for oily types.

avoid.name: Petroleum
avoid.reason: Creates an occlusive barrier that may trigger breakouts.

recommended.name: Kojic Acid
recommended.benefit: Effectively lightens sun damage and scars.

recommended.name: Niacinamide
recommended.benefit: Prevents melanin transfer to skin surface.

recommended.name: Retinol
recommended.benefit: Accelerates skin renewal to fade dark spots.

avoid.name: Photosensitizers w/o SPF
avoid.reason: Can worsen pigmentation when exposed to sun.

avoid.name: Undiluted essential oils
avoid.reason: May cause contact dermatitis and post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation.

recommended.name: SPF 30+
recommended.benefit: Protects against UV damage and premature aging.

avoid.name: Over-exfoliation
avoid.reason: Disrupts an already healthy skin barrier.

avoid.name: Unnecessary actives
avoid.reason: Can induce sensitivity when not needed.
